title: Jesus, Tender Shepherd, Hear Me

metadata.copyright: public domain.  This score is a part of the Open Hymnal Project, 2006 Revision.
c_lines: Words: Mary L. Duncan, 1839.  Music and Setting: 'Evening Prayer' John Stainer, 1898.
copyright: public domain.  This score is a part of the Open Hymnal Project, 2006 Revision.

1.raw_text: Jesus, tender Shepherd, hear me; Bless Thy little lamb tonight; Through the darkness be Thou near me; Watch my sleep till morning light.

2.raw_text: All this day thy hand has led me, And I thank Thee for Thy care; Thou hast clothed me, warmed and fed me, Listen to my evening prayer.

3.raw_text: Let my sins be all forgiven; Bless the friends I love so well; Take me, when I die, to heaven, Happy there with Thee to dwell.
